mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, version, status, owner, description, source FROM CARR_SCREEN_MENU_ASSIGNMENT
AND source = #{source}
AND (name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR description LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY status DESC, name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CARR_SCREEN_MENU_ASSIGNMENT (id, name, version, status, owner, description, source) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{version}, #{status}, #{owner}, #{description}, #{source})
